When the 10111 from the Ascendant and the Moon are devoid of
planets. t,he means of livelihood of the native will be indicated by the
brds of the native will be indicated by the lords of the Navamsas of the
planets owning the 10111 from the Ascendant. the SUn and tfle Moon.
The native will have his livelihood by merchandising (1) different
kinds of grass; grass used for thatching roofs. grass used for religious
purposes. used as fodder for cattle, used for making mats. etc. (2) gold
and articles of gold, and (3) blankets and dothes made of wool. He may
mai'ltain himself by dealing in medicines or by their adrnilistration when
the Sun happens to be the Navamsa lord.
Works connected with nails, teeth and skins {ivory and leather
works); cruel deeds. military service. travels, government jobs. and aircraft
may also be indicated.
The Moon as the Navamsa Lord makes the native do agricultural
work. trade in conches.
